name: Warm Salad of Mortadella, Frisee & Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 12 baby artichokes, outer leaves removed, stems trimmed and soaked in acidulated water
2 heads frisee or chicory, washed and spun dry
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichokes and cut each into quarters.
2. Heat olive oil in a 12 to 14-inch saute pan until smoking.
3. Add onion and garlic; saute until just softened, about 4 minutes.
4. Add Mortadella and stir until lightly browned, about 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Add frisee, thyme, and balsamic vinegar; toss until just wilted, about 45 to 60 seconds.
6. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
7. Divide among 4 plates and shave Parmesan cheese over each salad using a vegetable peeler.
Yield: 4 servings
